transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[What kind of fried chicken is this?]
[Only 2.5% from a 1.3kg chicken]
[Chicken Back Ribs]
[Let's find out]
[Chicken Plus]
[Back Ribs]
These are chicken back ribs
[You can't miss out on Rosé Tteokboki (Rice Cake)]
Finished
I will love Tzuyang
Hello everyone~
I'm here to eat some fried chicken
There's a very unique(?) meat called Chicken Back Ribs
I'm going to try it today
It's my first time hearing about it

They say it's a special kind of meat from a chicken
I wonder what it tastes like
Let's head in
[Chicken Plus located in Yeouido]
[What's this?]
[My only garden is Park Jungwon] (Jungwon means 'garden' in Korean)
[I'm a flower in your garden]
[The waitress got nervous because of Tzuyang]
Hey, I'm not Tzuyang
I'm practicing
Excuse me
She's calling you over
What should I do?
[Nervous]
The new item you will try today
is going to be out for a limited time

The 'Chicken Back Ribs' are only 2.5% from a chicken that weighs over 1.3kg
Have you heard about it?
No, first time today
It's our new menu with chicken back ribs Oh I see
But...
What is this?
I made this because I'm your fan
I will love Tzuyang
Thank you
[Secondhand embarrassment]
How many of them are there in 1 chicken?
28 pieces in 1 set
So if I want about 100 of them
How many sets do I need to eat?
28...
3.6 chickens 3.6 chickens?

Then I'll take 4 chickens
I got you
I will love Tzuyang
[Feelings need to be expressed often]
[Never-ending stacks]
[Wings and Drumettes come with back ribs]
[Let's stack those too]
[Chicken Plus Back Ribs]
Here are the equipment
Thank you
Equipment lol
That's a lot!
Amazing
[How many liters is that?]
We prepared this just for you
Thank you

It's a menu that goes really well with... chicken and beer
Really?
I drank this whole thing before as a different beer
Just press this and it'll pour
That scared me
[Is beer usually white..?]
What?
[Ruined]
[Retry]
[Success]
That's too heavy
These over here are the back ribs
It's my first time trying it
It looks like mini pork ribs
Beautiful colors
Bon appetit

Delicious
This!
How do I explain?
It's really like pork ribs Look at the bone
Looks just like pork ribs
Really cool looking bone
I thought it was just going to be the name
Didn't think it'll be literal back ribs
A little different from drumstick meat
It might be a little better
It tastes like chicken, but
It feels like I'm eating pork ribs
That's incredible
This is just what I like
I feel like I will order this from home
It's really tasty

I'll try the wings now
Wings and drummettes come with it
Is this spicy soy sauce?
I think it's spicy soy sauce
Wow, that's spicy
[Hot-shocking sauce]
Is it?
This is the kind of spiciness that blows all the stress away
Good kind of spicy
My mouth
Spicy around the lips
It's bearable though
My mouth could be on fire by the time I finish this
[Let's cool it down with the back ribs]
This is not drumstick nor breast
Just a chewy meat

There's mustard here
Not bad
It goes well together
This and beer seems perfect for a movie night at home
It's also very convenient to eat
The meat is yummy
Easy to grab and munch It's really nice
This is a good size to grab and eat
I'm always too lazy to pick out the bones
It's easy to pick the bone out
Put 1 in in
[De-boning]
Just like this
It's rare to feel not so heavy when eating chicken
The wings are very tender too
So good

[I will love Tzuyang ♡]
Can you eat 1 chicken?
I work at a chicken place, but I don't like eating chicken
Really? [Sorry boss]
You're too honest
Dropped it in mustard
It's really chewy and tender
So good
It's spicy
You can just see the juiciness
There's chicken juice(?) in here
So this is a special part, right?
Then the chicken...?
1 set includes 10 chickens
Then this is made with 40 chickens?
Sadly, yes

Poor chickens
[While laughing]
From a chicken that weighs over 1.3kg
only 2.5% of that is this meat
It's from the neck down the spine
That's the location?
Over here
[Showing it with her body]
I didn't think it was this spicy at first
It creeps up on you slowly
It's really spicy!
We're so sorry
Since I like you, love you, and want to protect you,
I will trade the wings into back ribs
Is that okay with you? I'd love that
Thank you

17 of them
Give us 17 more back ribs, please
I will love Tzuyang
[Her love is slowly fading away]
It's still spicy
This is no joke
Thank you
Here we have 17 back ribs
Yes, 17 of them
Let's speed things up a bit
I don't know how to explain this
Chips?
Junk food? Not that
Snack?
Something you'd eat as a kid
I'm sure many of you will be like, "Hey, I had this before"

"Where was this from again?"
How many do I have? (Counting)
[She ate a good amount too...]
Exactly 40 left
It looks very similar to wings, but the difference is that...
it's much more flavorful and less greasy
[Right about when she's about to fill up the bucket]
There's a very popular menu item that we have here
I want to let you have a taste I'd like that
But you had a lot of food already
I'm okay
I can give you a little bit and I can eat the rest
[Are you sure it's not because you want to eat it?]
I'll be right back [Excited]
[Rosé Chicken Tteokboki (Rice Cake)]
Thank you

What's this called?
This is Hororok, Wait no.
[Getting scolded]
Rosé Chicken Tteokboki
It's very popular here
Thank you
It's usually a lot bigger
But I just wanted you to have a taste
It looks good
Look at this
It's Rosé Tteokboki
With boneless chicken meat
Looks delicious
I remember Chicken Plus's Tteokboki being great
And it's still great
This is really good

I think this will go well with this sauce
Yummy
[I'm going to eat too]
It's perfectly seasoned
Really
It's like a Rosé Chicken Stew
Tasty
[Can't forget about the glass noodles]
Sliced potatoes in here just like fries
This tastes really good
It's really good
It's amazing
There's a pigeon here to watch you eat
[This place is horrifying]
[It's a very cruel scene for a pigeon to witness]
[Let's]

[Finish it up]
[Cleared]
[Must dip the last piece in Rosé sauce]
[Finishing up the tteokboki too]
Finished
Do you know how many you've eaten?
112 of them Really?
Exactly 112
You did a great job
[A souvenir]
It's a little weird for me to be carrying this around
I will love Tzuyang ♡
[We all anticipate it by now]
It was my first time eating chicken back ribs
I really enjoyed it
Chicken Plus is sponsoring a show program called

'Korea's Chicken War' which is starting early November
People come to develop special sauces
and the winner gets to be feature as Chicken Plus's new menu item
It also has a prize (up to 1 million won)
I ask for your interest and support
Thanks everyone
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
